results.title: MLB roundup: Marlins sweep Mets with walk-off grand slam
results.description: Heriberto Hernandez hit a walk-off grand slam Sunday afternoon for the Miami Marlins, who completed a three-game sweep of the visiting New York Mets with a 4-0 win. The post MLB roundup: Marlins sweep Mets with walk-off grand slam appeared first on Hawaii Tribune-Herald .

results.title: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, Nikola Jokic top All-NBA first-team picks
results.description: Most Valuable Player Shai Gilgeous-Alexander of the Oklahoma City Thunder and Nikola Jokic of the Denver Nuggets were unanimous selections to the All-NBA first team, announced Sunday night. The post Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, Nikola Jokic top All-NBA first-team picks appeared first on Hawaii Tribune-Herald .

results.title: Wreaking Havoc: Hilo High alum Mark Turner making name for himself in pro ultimate frisbee
results.description: He’s a BIIF champion in both track and cross country, still holding his school record in the 1,500-meter run. He’s tried just about every outdoor activity under the sun, including being an avid surfer. But 2009 Hilo High graduate Mark Turner found his true passion in a sport that few know about. The post Wreaking Havoc: Hilo High alum Mark Turner making name for himself in pro ultimate frisbee appeared first on Hawaii Tribune-Herald .

results.title: Wembanyama, Spurs rout Thunder in Game 4 to even series
results.description: After the San Antonio Spurs’ Game 3 loss, Victor Wembanyama took much of the blame on his own shoulders, saying he wasn’t doing enough to help his teammates. The post Wembanyama, Spurs rout Thunder in Game 4 to even series appeared first on Hawaii Tribune-Herald .

results.title: Dodgers takeaways: Max Muncy’s status, Kike Hernandez’s return and red-hot relievers
results.description: MILWAUKEE — Andy Pages’ booming two-run blast off Milwaukee Brewers reliever Shane Drohan capped a four-run fifth inning for the Los Angeles Dodgers on Sunday afternoon and served as the exclamation point to an all-around strong road trip for the back-to-back champions. The post Dodgers takeaways: Max Muncy’s status, Kike Hernandez’s return and red-hot relievers appeared first on Hawaii Tribune-Herald .
